name: MINERS-Social-Initiation

parameters.text: =Good {{ $('Build Context').item.json.dayOfWeek }}! 📣 Time for your social media post. Today's theme: {{ $json.theme }} Want to post today?

description: Fires Mon, Wed & Fri at 10am London time. Checks Supabase theme_config for override, falls back to week rotation. Creates a session row per recipient and prompts all 3 owners via Telegram Yes/No.
